REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (522 21st Ave, San Francisco, Ca 94121)
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brianna K. Mannion for SF Public Administrator, Petitioner.

The Court inquired whether there were any overbidders present in the courtroom or on Zoom. No overbidders came forward. The sale was confirmed at $1,280,000.00 based on the terms and conditions set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
